title: Tesla bull drops blunt take on gold rival
sentences: Tesla bull drops blunt take on gold rival Tesla bull Ross Gerber just took a sharp swing at Bitcoin (BTC).
This comes at a time when "king crypto" has slipped below its $70,000 mark for the first time since April, while its rival, gold, continues to hold the fort in green.
Gerber is the co-founder and CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth ...
